hypothesis: The cached FlashAttention payload can restore cleanly on a fresh pod, eliminating the expensive source-build tax before the full PR #414 repro.
promotion_gate: Warm-start bootstrap must complete from cache before spending on the 8x H100 SXM repro.

phases.description: Restore FlashAttention from the cached tarball and verify imports without rebuilding from source.
phases.failure_summary: Warm-start restore failed. Fix the cache or fallback path before spending on 8x.

success_summary: FlashAttention warm-start restored successfully. It is now safe to spend on the full PR #414 repro.
manual_next_command: If warm-start bootstrap is clean, manually launch the full repro: python3 scripts/run_watchdog.py run run_specs/repro_pr414_full.json
